headlines.headline: Orevar Marketplace recalls products in cloud infrastructure line due to quality concerns

sentiment.reasoning: A product recall in a core infrastructure line creates immediate operational disruption and potential reputational damage.

headlines.headline: Zrovex Industries secures $500M contract with a national infrastructure agency

sentiment.reasoning: Securing a large $500M contract provides clear, high-value revenue visibility for the company.

headlines.headline: Orevar Marketplace launches next-generation cloud infrastructure platform

sentiment.reasoning: Launching a next-generation platform signals growth and innovation, though the immediate financial impact depends on adoption rates.

headlines.headline: Varvov Retail Group to present at Global Innovation Summit

sentiment.reasoning: Presenting at a summit is a standard corporate event that typically lacks immediate material financial impact.

headlines.headline: Varvov Retail Group reports record quarterly revenue, up 8% year-over-year

sentiment.reasoning: Record quarterly revenue growth of 8% is a strong indicator of positive business momentum and financial health.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
